access_denied.title: Access Denied
access_denied.description: You do not have permission to manage room types. Please contact an administrator.

title: Room Types
description: Create and manage the different categories of rooms available at your property.
no_property_loaded: Property information could not be loaded. Please ensure you are assigned to a property.

edit_modal.title: Edit Room Type
edit_modal.description: Make changes to your room type below. Click save when you're done.

add_modal.title: Add New Room Type
add_modal.description: Define a new category of room for your property.

form.rooms_count_label: Number of Rooms of this Type (Optional)
form.room_numbers_description: If you know the specific room numbers for this type, list them here separated by commas.
form.description_placeholder: e.g., A spacious suite with a sea view and a private balcony.
form.beds_description: Specify the number of each bed type available in this room category.
form.amenities_description: Select all amenities that apply to this room type.
form.thumbnail_upload: Click to upload a primary image

view_modal.title: Room Type Details
view_modal.description: A summary of the room type's configuration.

validation_error.title: Validation Error
validation_error.description: Please fill in all required fields (Type Name, Max Guests).

error_save.title: Error
error_save.description: Could not save the room type. Please try again.

success_delete.title: Success
success_delete.description: Room type and all associated rooms and rate plans have been deleted.

error_delete.title: Error
error_delete.description: Could not delete the room type. Please try again.

confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete this room type? This will also delete all physical rooms and rate plans associated with it. This action cannot be undone.
no_room_types: No room types have been created yet. Add one to get started.
